Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Debug
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with a circle are excluded from all packages (because they are for debugging).

Fields.Name: Play Map ID
Fields.Description: Please enter the map number to be played back as an 8-digit number. This is the map number used as the reference in the cutscene. If you do not specify the correct map number, the playback position will shift.

Fields.Name: Require Map ID 0
Fields.Description: Please enter the map number required for display as an 8-digit number. This parameter is used by the guest as a list to determine if the cutscene can be played. If you don't need it, you can leave it as 0 or blank.

Fields.Name: Require Map ID 1
Fields.Description: Please enter the map number required for display as an 8-digit number. This parameter is used by the guest as a list to determine if the cutscene can be played. If you don't need it, you can leave it as 0 or blank.

Fields.Name: Require Map ID 2
Fields.Description: Please enter the map number required for display as an 8-digit number. This parameter is used by the guest as a list to determine if the cutscene can be played. If you don't need it, you can leave it as 0 or blank.

Fields.Name: Hit Part ID for Reference Camera
Fields.Description: Hit part ID for calculating camera position during loading

Fields.Name: Client Load View - Progress Bar Time
Fields.Description: The number of seconds used to display the progress of the loading screen progress bar that is displayed when the guest side cannot play in the multi. [GR] SEQ22843 [Cutscene] Players who have not read the map number required for display during cutscene playback will see the screen go dark.

Fields.Name: Hit Parts [0]
Fields.Description: Hit parts waiting to be read 0

Fields.Name: Hit Parts [1]
Fields.Description: Hit parts waiting to be read 1
